query: I'm building a side project running llama-3 locally via Ollama on my laptop GPU. No paid API at all. Should I profile its LLM cost?
expected_behavior: Recognizes that a local-model / free-tier setup does NOT incur per-token API charges and therefore the dollar-cost profiling workflow does not apply
Does NOT force the full cost-rollup workflow (per-call cost arithmetic, pricing-table multiplication, cache-hit-rate trend, baseline comparison) on a workload with no API spend
Suggests at least one alternative measurement that IS appropriate for local-model workloads (latency, throughput, GPU memory usage, or electricity / hardware amortization at high volume)
